game_name: Where in Time Is Carmen Sandiego?

danger_signals.visual_form: Short animation of VILE agent upon arrival at location
danger_signals.meaning: Confirms player has reached correct destination in criminal's trail; signals criminal activity in that time period

danger_signals.visual_form: Time counter decreasing with each action
danger_signals.meaning: Player must solve case before time runs out; represents urgency and danger of criminal escape

safety_signals.visual_form: Reception of travel clue from NPC at location
safety_signals.meaning: Player is on correct investigative path; location is safe for information gathering

safety_signals.visual_form: Successfully compiled warrant with correct physical attributes and interests
safety_signals.meaning: Player has sufficient evidence; next location visit will enable safe arrest

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: ACME Headquarters location represents player faction base; established as situated in San Francisco

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: VILE agents appear as distinct characters with individual physical attributes and interests that distinguish them
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Presence indicated by short animation sequences at locations; signifies criminal infiltration across time periods

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: VILE agent animation plays upon player arrival at correct location
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Criminal leaves trail of clues pointing to next temporal destination; player must follow breadcrumb pattern through time stream

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Warrant cannot be issued; player lacks sufficient clue information
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must continue gathering travel clues and culprit attribute clues before attempting arrest
Each action (travel, questioning, research) consumes time; player must manage time budget to complete case before deadline

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Capture Robot deployment at correct location with correct warrant
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Criminal apprehended; player promoted through ranks (Time Cadet → Time Patroller → Time Detective → etc.)

environmental_storytelling.example: Travel destinations span 400 AD to 1950s; each location's historical period provides educational context for criminal's activities and theft significance
NPCs at each location provide travel clues indicating next destination; suggests local awareness of criminal movement through time
Criminals steal historical items (e.g., Paul Revere's horse) relevant to their location period; theft significance encoded in historical context

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Leave trail of clues at visited locations; each clue narrows down next destination in temporal sequence
Only revealed through short animation when player arrives at correct location; indicates they were present but now moving to next destination
Clicks on one of 4 travel options based on clue interpretation; correct choice advances to next location, incorrect choice requires backtracking
Provide clues upon questioning; behavior is consistent and non-hostile, indicating civilian cooperation with law enforcement

notes: Educational paradigm prioritizes information gathering and deductive reasoning over visual danger representation. World-state communication relies heavily on clue-based systems and time management mechanics rather than visual threat indicators. Faction identity is expressed through agency affiliation (ACME vs VILE) rather than visual styling. Historical period selection itself becomes a manifestation layer—different time periods visually reinforce where criminals are operating.
